questions.stem: Nora ___ the table after dinner every night.
questions.explanation: every night 表示習慣，Nora 是第三人稱單數，所以用 cleans。

questions.stem: We ___ our bikes to the park on Saturdays.
questions.explanation: on Saturdays 表示平常習慣，主詞是 we，所以用 ride。

questions.stem: My dad ___ funny stories at bedtime.
questions.explanation: at bedtime 表示平常睡前的習慣，My dad 是第三人稱單數，所以用 tells。

questions.stem: I ___ my backpack on the chair after school every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示習慣，主詞是 I，所以用 leave。

questions.stem: The students ___ questions in science class every week.
questions.explanation: every week 表示平常上課的情況，主詞是複數 students，所以用 ask。

questions.stem: Ryan ___ orange juice with breakfast every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示習慣，Ryan 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 drinks。

questions.stem: My parents ___ the news at night.
questions.explanation: at night 表示平常晚上的習慣，主詞是複數 parents，所以用 watch。

questions.stem: The monkey ___ bananas at the zoo every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示習慣，The monkey 是第三人稱單數，所以用 eats。

questions.stem: We ___ cards when it rains on weekends.
questions.explanation: on weekends 表示平常情況，主詞是 we，所以用 play。

questions.stem: Helen ___ her grandma after school sometimes.
questions.explanation: sometimes 表示現在的習慣，Helen 是第三人稱單數，所以用 visits。

questions.stem: The boys ___ their helmets before biking every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常習慣，主詞是複數 boys，所以用 wear。

questions.stem: Our principal ___ at the school gate every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示習慣，Our principal 是第三人稱單數，所以用 stands。

questions.stem: Nora ___ the table after dinner last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 cleaned。

questions.stem: We ___ our bikes to the park last Saturday.
questions.explanation: last Saturday 表示過去，因此要用 rode。

questions.stem: My dad ___ funny stories at bedtime last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 told。

questions.stem: I ___ my backpack on the chair after school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 left。

questions.stem: The students ___ questions in science class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 asked。

questions.stem: Ryan ___ orange juice with breakfast this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 表示已經發生的事，因此要用 drank。

questions.stem: My parents ___ the news last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 watched。

questions.stem: The monkey ___ bananas at the zoo yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 ate。

questions.stem: We ___ cards during the rain last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 表示過去，所以用 played。

questions.stem: Helen ___ her grandma yesterday after school.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 visited。

questions.stem: The boys ___ their helmets before biking yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 wore。

questions.stem: Our principal ___ at the school gate yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 表示過去，因此要用 stood。

questions.stem: The artist ___ a beautiful picture for the wall last month.
questions.explanation: last month 表示過去，所以要用 painted。

questions.stem: My sister ___ her favorite toy in the drawer yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 kept。

questions.stem: Dad ___ the car keys from the drawer this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 表示已經發生的事，所以要用 took。

questions.stem: We ___ a rabbit in the field yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: yesterday afternoon 表示過去，因此要用 saw。

questions.stem: My teacher ___ my name at the prize ceremony yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 called。

questions.stem: The baker ___ fresh bread for the shop yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 表示過去，因此要用 made。
